# MCP Servers Configuration

## Overview

xtrm maintains **two MCP canonical sources** because Claude and Pi use different config formats.

## Canonical config files

- **Claude-family config**: `.xtrm/config/claude.mcp.json`
  - Synced into project `.mcp.json`
  - Format: `type`, `url`, `command`, `args`, `env`, `headers`
  - Optional servers: `.xtrm/config/claude.mcp.optional.json` (user-opt-in during sync)
- **Pi config**: `.xtrm/config/pi.mcp.json`
  - Synced into project `.pi/mcp.json`
  - Format: `command`, `args`, `lifecycle`, `idleTimeout`

## Sync behavior

Both sync flows are additive and preserve user edits:

- Canonical servers are added if missing.
- Existing user server entries are preserved and win on conflicts.
- Keys starting with `_` in canonical server definitions are ignored during sync.

## MCP servers in .mcp.json

Project `.mcp.json` (synced from `.xtrm/config/claude.mcp.json` + project additions):

| Server | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `github-grep` | http | GitHub code search via `https://mcp.grep.app` |
| `deepwiki` | http | Wiki/docs lookup via `https://mcp.deepwiki.com/mcp` |
| `gitnexus` | stdio | Code intelligence MCP (requires `gitnexus analyze` first) |
| `specialists` | stdio | Specialists workflow orchestration (added by `xt init`) |

Note: `specialists` is added during project init when the specialists package is configured, not from the canonical sync.

## MCP servers in .pi/mcp.json

Project `.pi/mcp.json` (synced from `.xtrm/config/pi.mcp.json`):

| Server | Transport | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `context7` | npx stdio | Upstash context7 MCP for docs lookup |
| `deepwiki` | npx adapter | Wiki/docs lookup via `pi-mcp-adapter` |
| `github-grep` | npx adapter | GitHub code search via `pi-mcp-adapter` |
| `gitnexus` | gitnexus stdio | Code intelligence MCP |
| `specialists` | specialists stdio | Specialists workflow orchestration |

This baseline ensures Pi specialists (including researcher workflows) can use docs lookup and code-search MCPs out of the box.

## Cross-repo dispatch wiring

The release contract uses `repository_dispatch` event type `specialists-asset-validation` to trigger `specialists-validation.yml` from the specialists repo. For the full dispatch architecture diagram and contract details, see **`docs/release.md` §1**.
